name: karpathy
description: Operationalizes Andrej Karpathy's LLM-coding principles as coding-agent skills. Audit agent instruction files, run default-on stale-doc/index checks, review code diffs before commit, run evidence-gated behavior-preserving refactors (/karpathy:refactor), maintain a local repo wiki, and update the Karpathy plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Audit instructions, review diffs, maintain a repo wiki, and update Karpathy.
interface.longDescription: Use Karpathy to audit CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, and other agent instruction files, tune default-on stale-doc and doc-index audit checks, review code changes for scope creep and missing verification, maintain a local Markdown repo wiki for task briefs and Q&A, and keep the Karpathy plugin current. The plugin reports first and applies fixes only after approval.
defaultPrompt: Review my changes before I commit.
Audit this AGENTS.md for agent guidance.
Where does refactoring actually pay off in this repo?
Set up a repo wiki for this project.
Use the repo wiki to brief this task.
